subcodes.first_line: This is what hath been sent down from the heaven of eternity, wherein is expounded the station in which the Beauty of God is established on the throne of His Great Name
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ما نزل من سماء القدم و فیه فصل مقام الذی فیه یستقر جمال الله علی عرش اسم
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
